scripts.build:bot: ./node_modules/.bin/prisma generate --schema=packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=packages/db && npm run build --workspace=apps/bot
scripts.build:web: ./node_modules/.bin/prisma generate --schema=packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run build --workspace=packages/db && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
